briefing_summary: Top art news for April 1, 2026: Major museum openings including LACMA's David Geffen Galleries, V&A East in London, and Refik Anadol's Dataland in LA. Busy month for art fairs with Artexpo New York, miart in Milan, Art Paris, and SP-Arte. Local events include the Pasadena Society of Artists 101st Annual Juried Exhibition and the launch of Timucua Talks.
